name: shy-meta-skills
description: Codex plugin that bundles Shy meta-thinking skills for knowledge topology, theory grounding, unknown-unknown discovery, and mathematical modeling.

interface.shortDescription: Meta-thinking and mathematical modeling skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Shy Meta Skills bundles Codex skills for mapping concepts into broader fields, tracing practical problems back to historical theory, discovering unknown unknowns, and turning real-world problems into mathematical models, formulas, calculations, and validation plans.
defaultPrompt: Find the theory ground behind this problem.
Use math-modeling-decomposer to turn this problem into variables, formulas, calculations, and validation steps.
